message:
test: pin inotify+sysinfo+getloadavg conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_inotify_sysinfo.rs covering 7 functions:
- inotify_init / inotify_init1: 4 flag combos
- inotify_add_watch / inotify_rm_watch: real-file IN_MODIFY watch
  add+rm round-trip, ENOENT edge
- sysinfo: totalram/totalswap/mem_unit exact match, uptime within 2s
- getloadavg: 3-value sanity (non-negative finite), nelem=0 edge

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-inot1
